final_response: I’ve escalated your case to a specialist on our team who will be able to assist you further.

hits.title: What should I tell the customer after escalating?
hits.summary: Use the following script after triggering an escalation. Inform the customer: 'I've escalated your case to a specialist on our team who will be able to assist you further.' For Critical/Safety: 'Given the nature of your concern, I've flagged this as urgent. A team member will contact you within 2 hours.' For High: 'A specialist will follow up with you within 24 hours.' For Normal: 'You can expect a response within 1-2 business days. Your ticket ID is [TICKET_ID].' Do not promise specific outcomes or resolutions the Tier 2 team hasn't confirmed.

hits.title: How do I create an Aura Electronics account?
hits.summary: Customers can create an account by visiting our website and clicking 'Sign Up' in the top right corner. An account allows users to track orders, register warranties, and initiate returns. Guest checkout is available, but guest orders cannot be viewed in the online order history.

hits.title: How do I reset my password?
hits.summary: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. A reset link will be sent to the registered email address. The link expires after 15 minutes. If the customer does not receive the email, advise them to check their spam folder and confirm the email address used at registration.
